name: Permanent Outdoor Led Lights – Christmas Lights
description: Model BD-PLD30 Product Title RGBIC Permanent Outdoor Lights Colors RGBIC changeable color Length 30lights 50ft  (15m) Control Methods APP, Voice Control Voice Control Google Assistant & Alexa Waterproof String Light–IP67,Control Box & Adapter–IP65 Voltage 24V Wattage ‎30W Lumens 25 lumens per light App Connectivity 2.4GHz Wi-Fi + Bluetooth Special Features Energy Efficient, Dimmable, Waterproof, Color Changing, Water Resistant
short_desc: Experience vibrant RGBIC color-changing outdoor LED lights with energy-efficient, dimmable features and robust IP68 waterproofing . Equipped with advanced APP and voice control via Google Assistant & Alexa, these durable aluminum-constructed lights ensure longevity and adaptability for residential or festive Christmas use. Certified by UL, they comply with stringent safety standards, offering buyers reliable market access and peace of mind.
